drills.title: Would Like To — Basic Polite Statements

sentences.english: I would like to have a cup of tea.
sentences.hindi: मैं एक कप चाय पीना चाहूँगा।
sentences.pronunciation: i would like to have a cup of tea

sentences.english: She would like to meet the manager.
sentences.hindi: वह manager से मिलना चाहेगी।
sentences.pronunciation: she would like to meet the manager

sentences.english: We would like to work on this project.
sentences.hindi: हम इस project पर काम करना चाहेंगे।
sentences.pronunciation: we would like to work on this project

sentences.english: Would you like to have some water?
sentences.hindi: क्या आप पानी पीना चाहेंगे?
sentences.pronunciation: would you like to have some water

sentences.english: Would he like to join the team?
sentences.hindi: क्या वह team में शामिल होना चाहेगा?
sentences.pronunciation: would he like to join the team

sentences.english: Would they like to attend the meeting?
sentences.hindi: क्या वे meeting में attend करना चाहेंगे?
sentences.pronunciation: would they like to attend the meeting

sentences.english: I wouldn't like to work overtime.
sentences.hindi: मैं overtime काम नहीं करना चाहूँगा।
sentences.pronunciation: i wouldnt like to work overtime

sentences.english: She would not like to discuss this in public.
sentences.hindi: वह इसे public में discuss नहीं करना चाहेगी।
sentences.pronunciation: she would not like to discuss this in public

sentences.english: They wouldn't like to cancel the deal.
sentences.hindi: वे deal cancel नहीं करना चाहेंगे।
sentences.pronunciation: they wouldnt like to cancel the deal

drills.title: Would Like To — Contractions (I'd / She'd / We'd)

sentences.english: I'd like to introduce myself.
sentences.hindi: मैं अपना परिचय देना चाहूँगा।
sentences.pronunciation: id like to introduce myself

sentences.english: She'd like to apply for this role.
sentences.hindi: वह इस role के लिए apply करना चाहेगी।
sentences.pronunciation: shed like to apply for this role

sentences.english: We'd like to offer you this position.
sentences.hindi: हम आपको यह position offer करना चाहेंगे।
sentences.pronunciation: wed like to offer you this position

sentences.english: I would like to contribute to your company's growth.
sentences.hindi: मैं आपकी company की growth में योगदान देना चाहूँगा।
sentences.pronunciation: i would like to contribute to your companys growth

sentences.english: I would like to build a long-term career here.
sentences.hindi: मैं यहाँ long-term career बनाना चाहूँगा।
sentences.pronunciation: i would like to build a long term career here

sentences.english: I would like to learn from this experience.
sentences.hindi: मैं इस experience से सीखना चाहूँगा।
sentences.pronunciation: i would like to learn from this experience

sentences.english: Would you like to see the menu?
sentences.hindi: क्या आप menu देखना चाहेंगे?
sentences.pronunciation: would you like to see the menu

sentences.english: I would like to file a complaint.
sentences.hindi: मैं एक complaint दर्ज करना चाहूँगा।
sentences.pronunciation: i would like to file a complaint

sentences.english: Would you like to upgrade your room?
sentences.hindi: क्या आप अपना room upgrade करना चाहेंगे?
sentences.pronunciation: would you like to upgrade your room

sentences.english: I would like to schedule a meeting with you.
sentences.hindi: मैं आपके साथ एक meeting schedule करना चाहूँगा।
sentences.pronunciation: i would like to schedule a meeting with you

sentences.english: We would like to discuss the proposal.
sentences.hindi: हम proposal पर चर्चा करना चाहेंगे।
sentences.pronunciation: we would like to discuss the proposal

sentences.english: She would like to present her findings.
sentences.hindi: वह अपने findings present करना चाहेगी।
sentences.pronunciation: she would like to present her findings

sentences.english: I would like to bring this to your attention.
sentences.hindi: मैं यह बात आपके ध्यान में लाना चाहूँगा।
sentences.pronunciation: i would like to bring this to your attention

sentences.english: I would like to formally apologize for the inconvenience.
sentences.hindi: मैं असुविधा के लिए formally माफी माँगना चाहूँगा।
sentences.pronunciation: i would like to formally apologize for the inconvenience

sentences.english: We would like to extend our sincere gratitude.
sentences.hindi: हम अपनी sincere gratitude व्यक्त करना चाहेंगे।
sentences.pronunciation: we would like to extend our sincere gratitude

drills.title: Would Like To vs Want To (Contrast)

sentences.english: I want to eat. (casual) / I would like to eat. (polite)
sentences.hindi: मैं खाना चाहता हूँ। (casual) / मैं खाना चाहूँगा। (polite)
sentences.pronunciation: i want to eat versus i would like to eat

sentences.english: I want to know. (direct) / I'd like to know. (gentle)
sentences.hindi: मुझे जानना है। / मैं जानना चाहूँगा।
sentences.pronunciation: i want to know versus id like to know

sentences.english: We want a table. / We would like a table, please.
sentences.hindi: हमें मेज़ चाहिए। / हम एक मेज़ लेना चाहेंगे।
sentences.pronunciation: we want a table versus we would like a table please

drills.title: Would Like To — Daily Life Sentences

sentences.english: I would like to visit my parents this weekend.
sentences.hindi: मैं इस weekend अपने माता-पिता से मिलने जाना चाहूँगा।
sentences.pronunciation: i would like to visit my parents this weekend

sentences.english: She would like to start a new hobby.
sentences.hindi: वह एक नई hobby शुरू करना चाहेगी।
sentences.pronunciation: she would like to start a new hobby

sentences.english: Would you like to come to the party tonight?
sentences.hindi: क्या आप आज रात party में आना चाहेंगे?
sentences.pronunciation: would you like to come to the party tonight

sentences.english: If possible, I'd like to work from home twice a week.
sentences.hindi: अगर हो सके, तो मैं हफ्ते में दो बार घर से काम करना चाहूँगा।
sentences.pronunciation: if possible id like to work from home twice a week

sentences.english: He said he would like to meet the director.
sentences.hindi: उसने कहा कि वह director से मिलना चाहेगा।
sentences.pronunciation: he said he would like to meet the director

sentences.english: We would like to inform you that your application has been approved.
sentences.hindi: हम आपको सूचित करना चाहेंगे कि आपका application approved हो गया है।
sentences.pronunciation: we would like to inform you that your application has been approved

drills.title: Would Like To — Short Answers Practice

sentences.english: Would you like to come? — Yes, I would. / No, I wouldn't.
sentences.hindi: क्या आप आना चाहेंगे? — हाँ, चाहूँगा। / नहीं, नहीं चाहूँगा।
sentences.pronunciation: would you like to come yes i would no i wouldnt

sentences.english: Would she like to join? — Yes, she would.
sentences.hindi: क्या वह join करना चाहेगी? — हाँ, चाहेगी।
sentences.pronunciation: would she like to join yes she would

sentences.english: Would they like to help? — No, they wouldn't.
sentences.hindi: क्या वे मदद करना चाहेंगे? — नहीं, नहीं चाहेंगे।
sentences.pronunciation: would they like to help no they wouldnt
